name: Echo Protocol
description:
You don't remember this case.
But it remembers you.

Echo Protocol is now a large native psychological mystery app with save slots, case-board progression, score ranks, achievements and a massive Deep Archive mode.

Investigate Mira Hartmann's disappearance through the handcrafted main case, then descend into 16 archive districts with hundreds of connected Echo files and more than 1,500 generated investigation layers. Files change. Dialogues contradict themselves. People recognize you... even when you've never met them.

The deeper you go, the less you can trust.

Not the evidence.
Not the people.

Not even yourself.

items: Added Deep Archive mega mode with 16 districts, 384 archive cases and 1,536 investigation layers.
Added score, rank and achievement tracking for long challenge runs.
Expanded save slots with score and progress metadata.
Added late-game archive unlocks, cross-links and additional endgame proof routes.
Updated the native app build with a much larger runtime content index.
Reworked the native UI with custom panels, meters, buttons, tabs and a scene status strip.
Added Atmosphere Build 0.6 fullscreen composition with cinematic evidence-board scene art, stronger glow, custom choice cards and reduced native debug-looking controls.
Introduced native EXE launch for improved performance and stability.
Implemented one-folder direct install workflow for seamless local updates.
Replaced browser-based startup with direct executable launch from the library.
Minor internal improvements and structural optimizations.
